message.content:
Thoroughly explore the SDUI adapter files and related models. I need:

1. List ALL adapter files in src/services/sdui/adapters/
2. Read the full content of each interactive adapter: ButtonAdapter.tsx, LinkAdapter.tsx, NavHeaderAdapter.tsx, PointsInputAdapter.tsx, TabBarAdapter.tsx, VoucherCardAdapter.tsx, RichTextAdapter.tsx
3. Read src/services/sdui/adapters/index.ts (the barrel/registration file)
4. Read src/services/sdui/models/index.ts - specifically the SDUIComponentRenderer type and SDUIActionDescriptor type
5. Read src/services/sdui/renderer/ScreenRenderer.tsx to see how onAction is currently passed
6. Read the adapter test file src/services/sdui/adapters/__tests__/adapters.test.tsx

Return the full content of all these files.

content.text:
⊰IUTP
